{{Quote|Where's our escort?!|Gruna|<ref name="nomi4" />}}
'''Gruna''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nessie]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of an [[Ithullan ore hauler]], which carried valuable [[mutonium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] through the [[Stenness Node]] in the years leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Gruna's [[Gruna's ore hauler|ship]] often came under attack by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], such as [[Finhead Stonebone]] and his [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|gang]], due to the hauler's expensive cargo. To counter this, Gruna paid local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] to provide security while the ore hauler made its runs through the pirates' territory. On one particular shipment in [[3999 BBY]], Stonebone's group ambushed Gruna's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], [[Death/Legends|killing]] Bogga's [[Bogga's enforcer gang|enforcer]], [[Dreebo]], and siphoning some of the ore. However, Bogga's [[Warship/Legends|warship]], [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], dropped out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and captured the pirates, saving Gruna, his crew, and his cargo.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Ore pirates, Captain Gruna! They're attaching to the hull!|One of Gruna's crewmembers|<ref name="nomi4" />}}
In the years leading up to the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], Gruna, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nessie]], worked as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of an [[Ithullan ore hauler]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Gruna's [[Gruna's ore hauler|ore hauler]], which was made from the carapace of a [[Colossus wasp/Legends|Colossus wasp]], transported valuable [[mutonium]] [[Ore/Legends|ore]] from [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colonies in the [[Stenness Node]] to the [[Stenness Hyperspace Terminal]]. However, these endeavors carried with them great risk, as local [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] often targeted the ore haulers while they traveled through the Node. To protect his cargo from the marauders, Gruna paid a fortune to local [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Bogga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] in exchange for armed escorts.<ref name="nomi4" />

In [[3999 BBY]],<ref name="Omni">''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Tales of the Jedi Volume 1]]''</ref> Gruna was making a routine shipment of mutonium to the Stenness Hyperspace Terminal when his ore hauler came under attack by [[Finhead Stonebone]]'s [[Finhead Stonebone's pirate gang|gang]] of pirates. One of Bogga's men, [[Dreebo]], quickly swooped in [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] to protect Gruna's vessel, but he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by pirate [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] [[C'borp]] in the pirate ship ''[[Marauder Starjacker]]''. Gruna and his ship were rendered defenseless, and the pirates breached the ore hauler's [[Hull/Legends|hull]] to begin siphoning the ore. However, Bogga's [[Warship/Legends|warship]], [[Enforcer One (dreadnaught)|''Enforcer One'']], appeared out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], capturing the pirates and saving Gruna and his crew.<ref name="nomi4" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I paid the Hutt a ''fortune'' to protect us from these scum!|Gruna|<ref name="nomi4" />}}
Gruna despised the pirates who plagued the Stenness Node, referring to them as "scum." He quickly grew exasperated and irritated when the pirates attacked his ship, as he expected [[Bogga's enforcer gang|Bogga's enforcers]] to come to his rescue faster.<ref name="nomi4" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gruna appears in ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider|Tales of the Jedi: The Saga of Nomi Sunrider]]'', the second story arc of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series, which was written by [[Tom Veitch]] and released over the course of late [[1993]] and early [[1994]]. He makes his sole appearance in the series in the arc's [[Tales of the Jedi 4|second issue]], which was illustrated by [[David Roach]].<ref name="nomi4" /> In [[1998]], Gruna was given an entry in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'',<ref name="Swe">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> and in [[2008]], he received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="cswe">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
